name: Observable Behavioral Discrepancy
description: The product's behaviors indicate important differences that can be observed by unauthorized actors, revealing internal state, decision processes, or differences from functionally equivalent products. This enables fingerprinting and targeted attacks.
detection_pattern: Look for CONTROL or STRUCTURAL nodes (decision logic, routing, feature flags) that produce observably different behavior patterns at EGRESS nodes (response timing, content, headers) that correlate with internal state, without a TRANSFORM node (behavior normalization) ensuring externally uniform behavior regardless of internal path taken.
